page.title: Sunseeker Predator vs Pershing 46: Marbella Charter Pick

data.meta_description: Compare Sunseeker Predator vs Pershing 46 for your Marbella charter. We break down size, speed, capacity & cost. Book the Pershing 46 now from €749/2h.
data.summary: A head-to-head comparison of the Sunseeker Predator and Pershing 46 for Marbella charters, covering key differences in design, performance, and pricing. The Pershing 46 is available in our fleet; the Sunseeker Predator is not, but this guide helps you decide which suits your needs.
key_facts: Sunseeker Predator typically 13-14m, 8-10 pax, not in our fleet.
Sunseeker Predator day charter in Marbella: ~€800-1,200/2h (market rate).
Pershing 46: top speed ~40 knots, Sunseeker Predator ~45 knots.
Both boats ideal for day trips to Cala del Faro or Estepona.
Pershing 46 includes skipper, fuel, drinks & snacks.
Book Pershing 46 via WhatsApp for exact availability.

faq.q: Can I charter a Sunseeker Predator in Marbella?
faq.a: Not from our fleet—we offer the Pershing 46 instead. Some other operators may have a Predator, but we recommend the Pershing 46 for similar performance and a better value package (skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks all included).

faq.q: Which is faster, Sunseeker Predator or Pershing 46?
faq.a: The Sunseeker Predator (typically 13-14m) can reach 45 knots, while the Pershing 46 tops out around 40 knots. Both are fast planing boats—ideal for a thrilling ride along the Costa del Sol.

faq.q: How many people can the Pershing 46 take?
faq.a: The Pershing 46 carries up to 10 passengers. The Sunseeker Predator (similar size) usually takes 8-10. For larger groups (up to 12 pax), consider our Azimut 58 Flybridge or Mangusta 80.

faq.q: What is the price for a half-day charter on the Pershing 46?
faq.a: Our Pershing 46 starts at €749 for 2 hours and goes up to €2,299 for 8 hours (all inclusive). For a Sunseeker Predator, expect market rates around €800-1,200 for 2 hours, but availability varies.

faq.q: Is the Sunseeker Predator better for parties?
faq.a: Not necessarily. The Pershing 46 has a spacious cockpit and sunpad, ideal for socialising. Both boats are open-plan. For serious partying, our Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) includes a free jet ski.

faq.q: Where can we go on a Pershing 46 from Marbella?
faq.a: Popular routes include Puerto Banús to Cala del Faro (15 min), Cabopino (30 min), or Estepona (45 min). The Sunseeker Predator covers similar distances. Both are great for coastal cruising.

faq.q: Does the Pershing 46 include a skipper and fuel?
faq.a: Yes, every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, wine, cava, snacks, insurance, and VAT. The Sunseeker Predator charters from other operators may not be all-inclusive.

faq.q: What if I want a boat like the Sunseeker Predator but bigger?
faq.a: Try our Pershing 46 (14m) or upgrade to the Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m) for more space. Both depart from Puerto Banús and offer similar sporty aesthetics.

data.body_html:
When you're choosing between a Sunseeker Predator vs Pershing 46 for a Marbella charter, the decision often comes down to availability, value, and what's included. The Sunseeker Predator is a celebrated sport cruiser, but it's not in our fleet. Instead, we offer the Pershing 46—a direct competitor in size, speed, and style. This guide compares both boats to help you pick the right one for your day on the Costa del Sol.

Size and Capacity: Pershing 46 vs Sunseeker Predator

The Pershing 46 measures 14 metres and can carry up to 10 passengers. The Sunseeker Predator (typically 13–14 metres) also seats 8–10 people. Both are designed for day trips—comfortable for a group of friends or family. If you need more space, our Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax) might be a better fit.

Performance and Speed

The Sunseeker Predator is known for its top speed of around 45 knots, thanks to twin diesel engines. The Pershing 46 is no slouch either, reaching approximately 40 knots. Both are planing hulls that deliver a thrilling ride. For a more relaxed cruise, the Astondoa 40 (12.5m) offers a smoother experience at lower speeds.

Design and Onboard Experience

Both boats feature open-plan layouts with sunpads, a cockpit seating area, and a small cabin below. The Pershing 46 has a sporty, aggressive look that turns heads in Puerto Banús. The Sunseeker Predator is equally stylish. Neither has a flybridge—so if you want elevated views, consider our Azimut 58 Flybridge.

Pricing: What You Get for Your Money

Boat2-hour charter8-hour charterInclusions
Pershing 46 (our fleet)€749€2,299Skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, VAT
Sunseeker Predator (market rate)~€800–1,200~€2,500–3,500Varies—often not all-inclusive

Our Pershing 46 charter includes everything: a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, and 21% VAT. No hidden extras. The Sunseeker Predator from other operators may charge extra for fuel or skipper.

Which Boat Should You Choose?

If you have your heart set on a Sunseeker Predator, you'll need to look elsewhere—but we believe the Pershing 46 offers equivalent thrills with better value. For a sporty, fast, and stylish day out, the Pershing 46 is a top pick. For larger groups or a party vibe, consider our Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) which includes a free jet ski.

Booking and Availability

Both boats depart from Puerto Banús. The Pershing 46 is available for charter now—just message us on WhatsApp for exact dates. The Sunseeker Predator is not in our fleet, so we can't guarantee its availability. For a hassle-free booking, browse our full fleet and pick the boat that matches your plans.

Frequently asked questions

Can I charter a Sunseeker Predator in Marbella?

Not from our fleet—we offer the Pershing 46 instead. Some other operators may have a Predator, but we recommend the Pershing 46 for similar performance and a better value package (skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks all included).

Which is faster, Sunseeker Predator or Pershing 46?

The Sunseeker Predator (typically 13-14m) can reach 45 knots, while the Pershing 46 tops out around 40 knots. Both are fast planing boats—ideal for a thrilling ride along the Costa del Sol.

How many people can the Pershing 46 take?

The Pershing 46 carries up to 10 passengers. The Sunseeker Predator (similar size) usually takes 8-10. For larger groups (up to 12 pax), consider our Azimut 58 Flybridge or Mangusta 80.

What is the price for a half-day charter on the Pershing 46?

Our Pershing 46 starts at €749 for 2 hours and goes up to €2,299 for 8 hours (all inclusive). For a Sunseeker Predator, expect market rates around €800-1,200 for 2 hours, but availability varies.

Is the Sunseeker Predator better for parties?

Not necessarily. The Pershing 46 has a spacious cockpit and sunpad, ideal for socialising. Both boats are open-plan. For serious partying, our Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) includes a free jet ski.

Where can we go on a Pershing 46 from Marbella?

Popular routes include Puerto Banús to Cala del Faro (15 min), Cabopino (30 min), or Estepona (45 min). The Sunseeker Predator covers similar distances. Both are great for coastal cruising.

Does the Pershing 46 include a skipper and fuel?

Yes, every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, wine, cava, snacks, insurance, and VAT. The Sunseeker Predator charters from other operators may not be all-inclusive.

What if I want a boat like the Sunseeker Predator but bigger?

Try our Pershing 46 (14m) or upgrade to the Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m) for more space. Both depart from Puerto Banús and offer similar sporty aesthetics.
